understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked '+' on the current level (BP35) without dying, using no more than 50 turns per attempt (2 attempts available per level), then continue clearing subsequent levels until the game is won.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you can MOVE_LEFT/MOVE_RIGHT (and other movement actions if available) to shift the player one tile; after movement, gravity (shown as DOWN here) causes the player to fall until supported, which can result in multi-tile vertical drops in a single turn. CLICK [x,y] targets a clickable/removable tile at that coordinate and removes it (consuming a turn/step), which can open paths or change how/where you fall; clicking an already-removed or non-interactive tile has no effect other than consuming the step if counted. Landing on a spike tile immediately ends the run/attempt (failure) and restarts the level for the next attempt. Undo (if provided) would revert the previous action/state, including position and removed tiles, but was not used in the recent sequence.

moving_platform.warning: URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 6 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 4 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 4 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
URGENT: rising platform will reach you in 4 horizontal moves. Clicks do not advance the platform. Move upward (toward lower y) or die.
